subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned with thy whole being to the Kingdom of God! With utmost joy did I read the epistle thou didst send [3.5s]... ...The East hath, verily, been illumined with the light of the Kingdom. Erelong will this same light shed a still greater illumination
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه بکلیته الی ملکوت الله انی بملا السرور قرئت الرق المنشور الذی بعثته
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @Word of God and human limitations, @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies, @return of Christ; second coming of Christ, @wisdom [hikmat], @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @The Holy Spirit
